payload.title: SuperAgent Overview
payload.query_preview: for an rfp about contact centre inbound ivr and outbound auto-dialer, please provide a conservative point-by-point response matrix for these requirements using the available documentation only: embeddable softphone/webrtc sdk inside the care browser app, screen-pop by member id, mid-ivr https lookup to customer system with fail-open to live agent, queue-driven outbound via api, pace multiplier ui,…
